tweet.text:
RT @WatchMarquee: Robbie Gould drafts Cubs players for his football team 👀 🏈
@BearsMarquee https://t.co/FkJqzrcRaH

RT @BearsMarquee: Week 5 props are in 🔒
@TWaddle87 and @RobbieGould09 make their picks! https://t.co/3bEAQ7rqDW

RT @WatchMarquee: "Caleb Williams is playing just about as efficient as you could possibly imagine."
@RobbieGould09 on Bears Den.
RT @BearsMarquee: #DaBears are the only team to allow 21 points or fewer in all 5 weeks this season 🧱 https://t.co/WeLXdC9km4

RT @BearsMarquee: .@RobbieGould09 predicted that the Bears would score exactly FIVE touchdowns yesterday!
He's 'Good as Gould' 😏 https://t…
